01-inline-text.title: Inline Text
01-inline-text.description: Anchor used inline within a paragraph — the primary use case for navigational links.

02-underline-variants.title: Underline Variants
02-underline-variants.description: Three underline styles available via Anchor.Underline: solid (default), dashed, and dotted.

03-preview-tooltip.title: Preview Tooltip
03-preview-tooltip.description: Hover over the links to see a tooltip preview — composed via the preview prop or Anchor.Preview.

04-breadcrumb.title: Breadcrumb
04-breadcrumb.description: Anchor used as navigational crumbs — the last segment is non-interactive text.
